items.title: An Investigation Into Years of Undetected Operations Targeting High-Value Sectors
items.author: Tom Fakterman
items.content: In-depth analysis of threat activity we call CL-UNK-1068. We discuss their toolset, including tunneling, reconnaissance and credential theft.
